utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified with appropriate details: destination (Lisbon, Portugal), travel_dates (June 20–24, 2024), transportation (flight details with costs, airline, route), accommodation (hotel name, type, cost, amenities), activities (three activities with individual costs), additional_services (notes about dining and allergy accommodations), and total_budget (clear total amount). Therefore, all required items are covered with full details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following items: Destination - Lisbon, Portugal; Transportation - Roundtrip Economy Flights with Standard Airline; Accommodation - Tranquil Inn; Activities - City Walking Tour, Golf Day, and Fine Dining Experience.
